user_claim: Customer: The item I ordered was not inside the box. | Support: Did the package look opened when you received it? | Customer: I checked it after delivery and could not find the product inside. | Support: What are you asking us to verify? | Customer: Please verify that the contents are missing from the package.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The claimed item is not visible in the submitted images.
claim_status_justification: The images provided do not show the claimed item or its absence clearly. img_1 shows the interior of the box filled with crumpled paper, but no evidence of the missing item is visible. img_2 shows the exterior of the box, which appears sealed and untampered. The evidence standard is not met.
